one_line_summary: A suite of CI-friendly, agent-readable production diagnostics for Godot 4 projects, mobile-first 2D games, release readiness, localization, visual smoke checks, save compatibility, and pixel asset workflows.

open_source_programme_fit.fit_summary: The project is structured as maintainable open-source infrastructure for a real developer ecosystem rather than as a single private project dump.
why_it_matters: Godot has strong editor and runtime tooling, but many indie teams lack lightweight CI gates for production readiness.
The tools target repeated release risks: export presets, texture memory, localization gaps, input coverage, scene signal drift, save compatibility, and visual regressions.
Every tool has CLI and agentic contracts so coding agents can run checks, parse output, and propose fixes.
not_claimed: No claim of existing broad public adoption before publication.
No private project examples are required to understand or use the tools.

tools.name: godot-project-doctor
tools.role: Umbrella CLI for planning, running, and summarizing the suite.
tools.review_value: Shows the suite is coherent and easy to run in one command.

tools.name: godot-ci-doctor-action
tools.role: GitHub composite action wrapper for CI adoption.
tools.review_value: Gives external maintainers a low-friction path to use the suite.

tools.name: godot-asset-pipeline-doctor
tools.role: PNG and Godot .import checks for pixel art and mobile memory risks.
tools.review_value: Catches concrete production defects before release.

tools.name: godot-export-preset-doctor
tools.review_value: Security-adjacent export validation with redaction-oriented reporting.

tools.name: gdscript-api-comment-coverage
tools.role: Public GDScript API documentation and coverage gate.
tools.review_value: Encourages maintainable APIs in larger Godot projects.

tools.name: godot-input-map-auditor
tools.role: Input coverage and duplicate binding checks.
tools.review_value: Directly supports cross-platform and mobile-first projects.

tools.name: godot-localization-qa-guard
tools.role: CSV/PO translation checks and project key usage scan.
tools.review_value: Turns localization into a repeatable release gate.

tools.name: godot-save-schema-guard
tools.role: Save fixture schema validation and migration command checks.

tools.name: godot-scene-signal-auditor
tools.role: Scene signal connection and autoload coupling analysis.
tools.review_value: Highlights maintainability risks in growing scene trees.

tools.name: godot-visual-smoke-test-kit
tools.role: Visual smoke plan, screenshot diff, and approval helpers.
tools.review_value: Adds visible regression evidence for game UI and render surfaces.

tools.name: godot-mobile-perf-doctor
tools.role: Static mobile performance diagnostics for Godot projects.
tools.review_value: Targets a high-friction Godot release problem: Android performance readiness.

tools.name: pixel-space-asset-toolkit
tools.role: Deterministic pixel sci-fi asset generation and cleanup utilities.
tools.review_value: Demonstrates usable visual tooling while staying generic.

ci_and_maintenance.tests: unittest suites in every Python tool plus root repository contract tests

current_limitations: The suite is pre-publication and does not yet have stars, forks, external issues, package downloads, or third-party usage reports.
Some specialized tools require project-specific fixtures or visual smoke capture scripts to be fully useful.
The tools are intentionally narrow and production-focused rather than a broad Godot framework.
adoption_gap: The remaining gap is organic public usage: stars, external issues, independent projects using the action, PyPI downloads, Godot forum mentions, and external PRs cannot be forced locally.
recommended_publication_path: Publish as one public umbrella repository with all tools and the GitHub Action.
Tag v0.1.0 and attach a release note that links AI_REVIEW_PACKAGE.md and this evidence file.
Publish the highest-demand packages to PyPI first: godot-project-doctor, godot-asset-pipeline-doctor, godot-export-preset-doctor, and godot-mobile-perf-doctor.
Share concise examples with Godot communities and invite focused issues.
